description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image with two stages: build and pages. Add a build job that runs in the build stage and executes the exact commands: npm install --only=dev, npm install --global grunt-cli, grunt, mkdir public, and mv {content,css,js,lib,plugin}/ index.html pdf.css public/. The build job should publish the public/ directory as an artifact named public that expires in 31 days. Add a pages job that runs in the pages stage, depends on the build job, only runs on the master branch, runs the command echo "Building pages ...", and publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact for deployment to GitLab Pages.
